rightsNotice: Independent AfroTools product. This data layer must not imply official FIFA, CAF, team, sponsor, or tournament partnership.

updatePolicy.sourceOfTruth: Only update fixtures, groups, squads, venues, and scores from verified official tournament, confederation, federation, or host-city sources.
updatePolicy.placeholderPolicy: Use status=placeholder and isPlaceholder=true when a match, group, venue, opponent, or kickoff is not verified. Placeholder rows must not be shown as live results.
updatePolicy.scorePolicy: Scores remain null until a match has a verified result. resultFinal stays false until the result is confirmed.

sourceNotes.label: FIFA official match schedule
sourceNotes.use: Full group-stage fixture board, dates, venues, kickoff times, and Africa bonus display.

sourceNotes.label: FIFA final draw results
sourceNotes.use: Group composition and qualification context for African-team rooms.

sourceNotes.label: KickoffAdventures schedule extraction check
sourceNotes.use: Extraction aid for the 72 group-stage rows, cross-referenced to FIFA official schedule and updated playoff winners.

predictionGame.prizeHeadline: Win up to $500 in the Matchday OS Prediction Challenge.
predictionGame.prizeSupportCopy: Top 10 verified players share a $1,200 prize pool. First place receives $500.
predictionGame.rulesNotice: Final rules, eligibility, scoring, sponsor terms, and dispute process must be published before accepting entries.
predictionGame.responsiblePlayNote: Free-to-enter football knowledge challenge. No staking, no odds, no paid entries, and no gambling framing.

cashPrizeRules.winnerBasis: Top 10 verified players on the final Prediction Points leaderboard
cashPrizeRules.publicLeaderboardNotice: The public leaderboard is provisional. Final winners are confirmed only after anti-cheat and eligibility review.
cashPrizeRules.top20TrackerCopy: The public tracker may show a Top 20 leaderboard for excitement and sharing, but only the final verified Top 10 receive cash prizes.
tieBreakers: Higher number of correct match outcomes
Higher number of correct African-team predictions
Earlier submitted locked predictions across the tournament
cashPrizeRules.payoutSafetyCopy: AfroTools will never ask winners to pay a fee to claim a prize. If anyone asks you for a fee, it is not AfroTools.
cashPrizeRules.cryptoSafetyCopy: Crypto payout may be available where lawful and practical. Winners who choose crypto are responsible for providing a correct wallet address. AfroTools may use another payout method if crypto is not suitable, safe, or available.
cashPrizeRules.legalStatus: Rules draft pending legal review. Prize availability may depend on country, age, verification, payout availability, and local rules.

lockPolicy.label: Predictions lock before kickoff
lockPolicy.placeholderLockCopy: Group-stage predictions are open in local demo mode. Exact kickoff locks start once official kickoff times are added.

scoring.africanTeamBonusCopy: +2 bonus points when a correct match, qualifier, or champion pick involves an African team. This keeps every fixture playable while making African-team success matter.

entryCards.title: Match call
entryCards.copy: Pick a fixture result and optional exact score. Fixture picks lock at kickoff once verified kickoff data exists.

entryCards.title: Group race
entryCards.copy: Choose two group qualifiers from the available seed teams. This remains a local planning pick until verified groups are complete.

entryCards.title: Tournament path
entryCards.copy: Build a tournament path: best African team, semi-finalists, finalists, and champion.

prediction.typeId: match_winner | exact_score | draw_prediction | group_qualifiers | best_african_team | semi_finalists | finalists | champion

userPrediction.userPredictionId: string slug generated by backend later
userPrediction.matchPick: object with matchId, resultPick, homeScore, awayScore
userPrediction.tournamentPicks: object with bestAfricanTeamId, semiFinalistTeamIds, finalistTeamIds, championTeamId

scoreCalculation.resultSource: verified static data or backend result source

leaderboard.copy: The public tracker may show Top 20 players for excitement, but the cash-prize leaderboard uses Prediction Points only. Top 10 verified players share the $1,200 prize pool after backend scoring, lock enforcement, anti-cheat review, and eligibility checks are complete.
leaderboard.verificationNotice: The public leaderboard is provisional. Final winners are confirmed only after anti-cheat and eligibility review.

fanPoints.publicCopy: Bring your friends into Matchday OS. Earn Fan Points, climb the Top Fans board, and unlock badges. Cash-prize winners are decided by Prediction Points only.
fanPoints.separationNotice: Fan Points are separate from Prediction Points and do not decide cash-prize winners.

scoreTypes.label: Prediction Points
scoreTypes.copy: Prediction Points are earned only from football predictions and decide the $1,200 prize leaderboard after backend scoring and legal gates are complete.

scoreTypes.label: Fan Points
scoreTypes.source: predictions, sharing actions, referrals, badges, and community activity
scoreTypes.copy: Fan Points power Top Fans, badges, shoutouts, sponsor perks, and non-cash recognition. They never change the cash-prize ranking.

firstLockedPrediction.awardState: releases verified-session referral reward after backend checks

referralEvent.referredUserId: string or null until account/session exists

abuseProtection.copy: Self-referrals, duplicate/device matches, repeated IP clusters, and suspicious rapid signups require backend review before Fan Points are awarded.

detectionRules.label: One referral reward per referred user

topFans.copy: Top Fans requires backend accounts, verified referral events, community activity, and abuse checks before live rows appear.

publicTrustCopy: Suspicious or duplicate entries may be disqualified
This is a skill-based prediction challenge, not betting

serverSignals.notes: Raw IP addresses, user agent strings, and device/session fingerprints must be hashed server-side before storage.

operatorShell.copy: Operator review is a shell only. Live flags, exports, and overrides require authenticated admin tooling and audit logs.

africaBonusPolicy.copy: Players can predict every group-stage fixture. Correct calls involving African teams earn the African Team Bonus, so Africa remains the emotional edge without shrinking the game.
appliesTo: correct winner involving an African team
correct draw in a match involving an African team
exact score in a match involving an African team
africaBonusPolicy.cashPrizeNote: Bonus points are part of Prediction Points. Fan Points and referrals still do not affect cash-prize ranking.

shareCards.label: Watchlist card
shareCards.template: I am tracking {teamName} on Matchday OS. Pin your African team: https://afrotools.com/matchday-os/

shareCards.label: Prediction card
shareCards.template: My Matchday OS pick: {teamName} to go deepest. What's yours? https://afrotools.com/matchday-os/

contextModules.title: Daily African football brief
contextModules.copy: Short daily notes can attach to fixtures through contentSlug when editorial posts exist.

contextModules.title: Viewing-center operator pack
contextModules.copy: Connect ticket revenue, match ticket comparison, and WhatsApp tools for venue operators.

contextModules.title: Sponsor a matchday moment
contextModules.copy: Buyer-facing route for clearly labeled sports and viewing-center placements.
